::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\thispagestyle{empty}
\AddToShipoutPictureBG*{\AtPageUpperLeft{\includegraphics[width=\paperwidth,height=\paperheight]{images/ch3_cover.jpg}}}
\null
\newpage
\pagecolor{thesissand}
:::

# Where do Kōura Live {.unnumbered}

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\vspace{1cm}
\begin{center}
Olivier V. Raven, Francis J. Burdon, Ian A. K. Kusabs,\\
Robin Holmes \& Deniz Özkundakci\\[0.6cm]
\textit{Hydrobiologia} --- Accepted
\end{center}
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="docx"}
![](../images/ch3_cover.jpg){fig-align="center" width=15cm}

Olivier V. Raven, Francis J. Burdon, Ian A. K. Kusabs, Robin Holmes & Deniz Özkundakci

*Hydrobiologia* — Accepted
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
\afterpage{\pagecolor{thesiscream}}
:::

{{< pagebreak >}}
